description:
## Product Fitment List
A customizable table designed to clearly display product compatibility with specific units. Commonly used on product detail pages for vehicle fitment (year, make, model), HVAC systems, hardware, appliances, and machinery. It provides customers with a quick way to confirm whether a product works with their equipment, reducing uncertainty and improving purchase confidence.
